column1: # Create zip of all domain files
# ArtChat 24-Domain Ecosystem — SFTP Deploy to cPanel
# Requires: SFTP_HOST, SFTP_USER, SFTP_PASS env vars (or SSH key)
# cPanel document root pattern — adjust if yours differs
# Detect changed domains and deploy only those
CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD -- domains/ | cut -d'/' -f2 | sort -u)
deploy:                 ## Deploy ALL domains via SFTP
deploy-one:             ## Deploy single domain: make deploy-one D=720.chat
validate:               ## Check all checkout URLs are valid
